requirements.verification_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db deploy --kind hooks --target "$tmpdir/lifeos-deploy-test" --json

requirements.requirement: Expose watch or equivalent tested incremental invalidation without making core depend on it
requirements.verification_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; mkdir "$tmpdir/envctl"; git -C ../envctl archive HEAD | tar -x -C "$tmpdir/envctl"; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root "$tmpdir/envctl" scan --json && cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root "$tmpdir/envctl" watch --json
